name: Regulatory Shock Test
description: Crisis simulation where new regulations or enforcement actions threaten core business models. Tests organizational response to compliance emergencies and stakeholder alignment under pressure.

customization.context: Balancing business continuity with regulatory compliance
Managing legal exposure and regulatory negotiations
Enforcing new regulations with limited flexibility

round_structure: Shock introduction: Regulator announces enforcement action or new rule
Initial impact assessment: Legal and risk teams quantify exposure
Stakeholder mapping: Identify affected parties and communication priorities
Response option generation: Develop compliance and mitigation strategies
Regulatory negotiation: Engage with regulator on timeline and remediation
Board escalation: Present options and recommendations to board
Implementation planning: Define action items, owners, and deadlines
Reputation management: Craft external messaging and investor communication

visibility_rules.regulator_intel: Regulator has private information about investigation scope

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Legal risk veto by General Counsel; CEO override requires board notification
environment_config.escalation_trigger: If compliance cost exceeds revenue threshold, mandatory board review
environment_config.time_pressure: Regulator-imposed deadlines create round time limits
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Legal-Compliance coalition for conservative approach; CEO-CFO for business preservation
